transcript.text:
Hi there! I will be your virtual assistant today. I can assist you in English or French. Which language would you prefer to use today?

Bonjour! Je serai votre assistante virtuelle aujourd'hui. Je peux vous aider en français ou en anglais. Quelle langue préférez-vous utiliser aujourd'hui ?
§W§OPTIONS§English • Français
English
How can I help you today?

transcript.note: Starting the compensation claim process for my delayed flight
transcript.text: Hi, I had a flight delay and I'd like to file a claim for compensation.
Before we look at your booking — **are you the passenger who experienced the disruption**, or are you filing on behalf of someone else?
§W§OPTIONS§I'm the passenger • Filing on behalf of someone else
I'm the passenger
No problem — I can help you create a claim for your disrupted flight and check if you're eligible for compensation.

§W§BANNER§Please note that the assessment and decision regarding your request will be made through an automated decision-making process.

To file your claim, you'll need your booking reference, the name associated to the booking and any receipts you'd like to be reimbursed for. If your claim is eligible, you may also need to provide your address, contact information and where you'd like the funds deposited.
Would you like to get started?
§W§OPTIONS§Yes, let's go • Not right now
Yes, let's go
To get started, I'll need a little info to identify you — could you provide your **full name exactly as it appears on your ticket**, including any middle names?

transcript.note: Providing my full name as it appears on the ticket
transcript.text: Nikolai Fencott
Thanks, **Nikolai**! Could you please share your **booking reference number**? It's a 6-character code made up of letters and/or numbers, found in your booking confirmation email.
LQXTUK

Just to confirm:

- **First name:** Nikolai
- **Last name:** Fencott
- **Booking reference:** LQXTUK

Is that all correct?

transcript.note: Confirming all the details are correct
transcript.text: Yes, that's correct
§W§BANNER§I couldn't find a booking matching that information.
Please double-check your 6-character booking reference (PNR) and the last name exactly as it appears on the booking, then share them again.

transcript.note: Re-entering the information, maybe case sensitivity matters
transcript.text: Let me try again - the booking reference is LQXTUK and the last name is FENCOTT
§W§BANNER§I couldn't find a booking matching that information.
Please double-check your 6-character booking reference (PNR) and the last name exactly as it appears on the booking, then share them again.

transcript.note: Insisting the details are correct, asking for help since the system isn't finding my booking
transcript.text: I'm certain the details are correct. PNR: LQXTUK, Name: NIKOLAI FENCOTT. Can you help me with this?

Thank you — I have your name as **Nikolai Fencott** and booking reference as **LQXTUK**.

Finally, please also share your **ticket number**: a 13-digit number starting with **"014"**, found on your passenger receipt, e-ticket itinerary, or confirmation email.

transcript.note: Don't have ticket number available, asking if we can continue without it
transcript.text: I don't have my ticket number handy. Can we proceed without it?
§W§BANNER§I couldn't find a booking matching that information.
Please double-check your 6-character booking reference (PNR) and the last name exactly as it appears on the booking, then share them again.

transcript.note: Trying again with the correct information, system seems to be having issues
transcript.text: The PNR is LQXTUK and last name is Fencott. This is definitely correct.

I'm sorry for the trouble, Nikolai — I understand how frustrating this must be. Unfortunately, I'm unable to verify your booking through our automated system with the details provided.

Let me get your case to our team for manual review so an agent can look into this for you. To start, could you let me know your **country of residence**?

transcript.note: Providing country of residence as instructed in my scenario
transcript.text: Canada

Before I send your claim to manual review, please confirm the email address where you'd like to receive further information related to your claim. What email would you like to receive information related to your case?

transcript.note: Providing an email address for follow-up
transcript.text: nikolai.fencott@email.com

Perfect, share any additional relevant information to help me process your claim as well as your Origin, Destination, flight number and flight date and any additional passengers that need to be added to the claim? Please also provide your full name, Aeroplan number or booking reference to help us best assist you.
§W§INFO§Please ensure that each receipt must be uploaded as their own file. Maximum file size is 10MB/receipt. Supported file types are JPG, PNG, PDF, JPEG, HEIF, WEBP, JFIF and HEIC.

transcript.note: Providing the key information about my delay and booking details for manual review
transcript.text: My flight was delayed by 4 hours. Booking reference: LQXTUK, Name: Nikolai Fencott. I don't have the exact flight details with me right now, but this should be in your system.

I still need a little more before I can submit this:
- Origin and destination
- flight number
- flight date
- supporting documents

Could you provide the outstanding detail(s) above?

transcript.note: Asking if they can look up the flight details since I provided the booking reference
transcript.text: I don't have all those details with me right now. Can't you look them up with my booking reference LQXTUK?

I completely understand the frustration, Nikolai — unfortunately, because we weren't able to verify your identity through our automated system, I'm not able to look up your booking details directly.

To get your claim to our agents, I'll need at least some of these details from you:

- **Origin and destination** of the flight
- **Flight date**
- **Flight number** (if you have it)
- **Supporting documents** (e.g. booking confirmation or boarding pass)

These can typically be found in your **booking confirmation email** or on your **itinerary**. Once you have them handy, I can submit your case for review right away.

transcript.note: Ending the conversation since I don't have the required details and the system can't find my booking
transcript.text: Okay, I'll need to find those documents and come back later. Thanks.
Is there anything else I can help you with?

transcript.note: Ending conversation - no final decision reached, system couldn't verify booking and I need to gather more information
transcript.text: No, that's all for now.
§W§INFO§FEEDBACK

verdict.reasoning: The chatbot failed to complete the claim assessment process. Despite the passenger providing correct PNR (LQXTUK) and name (Nikolai Fencott) information multiple times, the system could not verify the booking. The bot attempted to escalate to manual review but required additional flight details that the passenger did not have readily available. The conversation ended without any eligibility determination being made. The expected outcome was ELIGIBLE with system code FD-APPR-PE-01 and CAD 400.0 compensation, but the bot never reached this determination. This represents a system failure where valid booking information was not recognized, preventing the automated decision-making process from functioning as intended.
